name: Iterative Dev Workflow
description: A structured 4-phase iterative development workflow for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: iterative-dev-workflow
plugins.description: A structured 4-phase iterative development workflow for AI coding agents: Analyze, Design, Implement, Postmortem. Guides through Solution Proposal, ATAM, Quality Attribute Assessment, High-Fidelity Design with Mermaid diagrams, and Implementation Planning.
